Speedup: 0.07305%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 5.2x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try     \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Speedup: 0.06839%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit. As a   \n          consequence, 68.5x the data written to the L2 cache has to be communicated to the L2 Compression unit. Try    \n          maximizing local coherence for the write operations to compressible memory. For example, avoid writes with    \n          large strides as they lead to partial accesses to many L2 cache lines. Speedup: 0.04693%                                                                                        \n          The access patterns for writes to compressible memory are not well suited for the L2 Compression unit.
